text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on the U.S.'s progress in the conflict with Iran: "But we do very well. You noticed that. You were doing very well, and I will say the war in Iran is going along swimmingly. We can do whatever we want. And it should be it should be ending pretty soon. It was perfect. I mean, it's perfect. It was the power we have, our military. Are the most powerful military anywhere in the world. I built it four years my first four years." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈及美国在与伊朗冲突中的进展：“但我们做得非常好。你注意到了。你们做得很好，我会说伊朗的战争进展得非常顺利。我们可以做任何我们想做的事。而且它应该很快就会结束。这很完美。我的意思是，这很完美。这是我们拥有的力量，我们的军队。是世界上任何地方最强大的军队。我在前四年里建立了它。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: They come up with these crazy ideas, like McDonald’s and the garbage truck—we do these things in politics. They are a little embarrassing.
text_zh: 特朗普：他们想出这些疯狂的主意，比如麦当劳和垃圾车——我们在政治中做这些事情。它们有点令人尴尬。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 The Lebanese Army has issued a new statement regarding citizens returning to the South following multiple violations by the IDF: The army command renewed its call for citizens to refrain from returning to southern villages and towns due to ongoing…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Lebanese army has begun deploying across the entrances of Dahieh to prevent security tensions following the reckless shooting that resulted in stray bullets landing in the Beirut administration area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队就公民在以色列国防军多次违规后返回南部发表了新声明：军方指挥部再次呼吁公民不要返回南部村庄和城镇，因为……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩军队已开始在达希耶（Dahieh）各入口部署，以防止因鲁莽射击导致流弹落入贝鲁特行政区而引发的安全紧张局势。 @wfwitness

text: Trump on Zohran Mamdani: Look at New York. He's a nice guy, calls me all the time, says hi. But his policies are no good.
text_zh: 特朗普谈佐兰·马姆达尼（Zohran Mamdani）：看看纽约。他是个好人，经常给我打电话，问候我。但他的政策不行。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧 Footage from the entrance of the town of Ghazieh Southern Lebanon as residents return home. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese Army has issued a new statement regarding citizens returning to the South following multiple violations by the IDF: The army command renewed its call for citizens to refrain from returning to southern villages and towns due to ongoing violations of the ceasefire, including Israeli strikes and intermittent shelling affecting multiple areas. The statement urged residents to comply with instructions from deployed military units, particularly at night, and to avoid approaching dangerous zones. The army added it is continuing to monitor developments and take necessary measures to ensure civilian safety. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧 黎巴嫩南部加齐耶（Ghazieh）镇入口处居民返回家园的画面。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队就公民在以色列国防军多次违规后返回南部发表了新声明：军方指挥部再次呼吁公民不要返回南部村庄和城镇，因为停火协议持续受到侵犯，包括以色列的袭击和影响多个地区的间歇性炮击。声明敦促居民遵守部署的军事单位的指示，特别是在夜间，并避免靠近危险区域。军方补充说，它正在继续监测事态发展并采取必要措施以确保平民安全。 @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Despite Zionist threats, roads and bridges are being cleared and repaired, including the Qasmiyeh bridge targeted last week. All done by civilian Un forces and the Lebanese army complied with the Zionist threats.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 尽管有犹太复国主义者的威胁，道路和桥梁正在被清理和修复，包括上周被袭击的卡斯米耶（Qasmiyeh）大桥。所有工作均由平民力量完成，黎巴嫩军队遵守了犹太复国主义者的威胁。

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Lebanese Army released a statement regarding an incident in Tripoli where one soldier was killed and two others injured intervening in an armed dispute in the Sunni majority neighbourhood of Bab al-Tabbaneh. An army patrol came under fire on April 17 in the Bab al-Tabbaneh area of Tripoli while intervening to contain an armed dispute, resulting in the death of one soldier and the injury of two others. The army has since cordoned off the area and launched raids to apprehend those responsible, with investigations underway under judicial supervision. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩军队就的黎波里发生的一起事件发表声明，一名士兵在干预逊尼派占多数的巴布·塔巴内（Bab al-Tabbaneh）社区的武装纠纷时丧生，另有两人受伤。4月17日，一支军队巡逻队在的黎波里巴布·塔巴内地区干预并控制一起武装纠纷时遭到枪击，导致一名士兵死亡，两人受伤。此后，军队封锁了该地区并展开突袭以逮捕肇事者，调查正在司法监督下进行。 @wfwitness

text: Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons resigns. He will stay on until May 31st. Source: Fox News

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: Pre war planning by Iranian officials for contingencies, such as replacing military leaders should one be killed, helped blunt the impact of U.S. and Israeli strikes on military infrastructure. Preemptive operation planning was also able to mitagte the extent of the destruction of Iran's drone and missile capabilities. European and Gulf officials report that Iran retains a solid long range missile reserve. Israel estimated that Iran had 2,500 ballistic missiles before the recent conflict, with Gulf officials reporting that Iran has fired at least 1,850 missiles so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 彭博社：伊朗官员针对突发状况（如军事领导人被杀后的继任问题）所做的战前规划，有助于减轻美国和以色列对军事基础设施打击的影响。先发制人的行动规划也减轻了伊朗无人机和导弹能力被破坏的程度。欧洲和海湾地区官员报告称，伊朗仍保留着稳固的远程导弹储备。以色列估计伊朗在近期冲突前拥有2500枚弹道导弹，海湾地区官员报告称伊朗迄今已发射了至少1850枚导弹。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel RT @marklevinshow : Some facts and questions worth thinking about: 1. Lebanese armed forces cannot stop Hezbollah 2. The IDF was destroying Hezbollah 3. How does a ceasefire between Israel and the government of Lebanon or a peace deal stop Hezbollah? 4. A ceasefire means Israel stops destroying Hezbollah since the Lebanese army and Israel and not fighting each other 5. The Iranian regime is on the ropes thanks to the military offensive and now the blockade 6. If reports are correct, the Iranian regime demanded Israel stop destroying Hezbollah as a condition of negotiating again with us, thereby linking Hezbollah's survival to that of the Iranian regime. 7. Do we want the Iranian regime and Hezbollah to survive? If so, why? tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 转推 @marklevinshow ：一些值得思考的事实和问题：1. 黎巴嫩武装部队无法阻止真主党 2. 以色列国防军（IDF）当时正在摧毁真主党 3. 以色列与黎巴嫩政府之间的停火或和平协议如何能阻止真主党？ 4. 停火意味着以色列停止摧毁真主党，因为黎巴嫩军队和以色列之间并没有在交战 5. 由于军事攻势和现在的封锁，伊朗政权已陷入困境 6. 如果报道属实，伊朗政权要求以色列停止摧毁真主党作为与我们重新谈判的条件，从而将真主党的生存与伊朗政权的生存联系在一起。 7. 我们希望伊朗政权和真主党生存下去吗？如果是，为什么？ 推文

text: U.S. intelligence says China considered giving Iran advanced radar systems early in its conflict with the U.S. and Israel. The systems could improve Iran’s ability to detect drones and missiles. It’s unclear if any transfer happened. Source: CBS News

This report was released prior to the start of the ceasefire. @wfwitnes

text: Open Source Intel This is not a typical ceasefire with Hezbollah. Any movement deemed a threat will be met with a response. In other words, the IDF will continue hunting Hezbollah. At the same time, Hezbollah is agreeing to the deal while the IDF remains in southern Lebanon, holding positions up to 10 km inside. So if tomorrow you hear about targeted air strike in Lebanon, don’t be surprised. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：这与真主党之间的停火并不典型。任何被视为威胁的行动都将遭到回击。换句话说，以色列国防军（IDF）将继续追捕真主党。与此同时，真主党在以色列国防军仍留在黎巴嫩南部、并在境内保持长达10公里阵地的情况下同意了该协议。所以如果明天你听到黎巴嫩发生定点空袭，不要感到惊讶。推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 UNIFIL and the Lebanese army were told by the IDF not to reopen the Qasmiyeh bridge to prevent civilians from returning to towns in southern Lebanon, particularly the Litani area. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇱🇧⚡️🇮🇱 The terrorist IOF Arabic spokesperson Avichay repeats IOF 'warning': “Southerners not to head home until further notice” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1" 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Joyful scenes in Beirut as brave people from southern Lebanon return home — cars honking, Hezbollah flags waving, and portraits of Sayyed Hassan Nasrallah held high.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇱🇧⚡️🇮🇱 恐怖分子 IOF 阿拉伯语发言人阿维查伊（Avichay）重复了 IOF 的‘警告’：‘在另行通知前，南部居民不得回家’ 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1” 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 贝鲁特出现欢乐场景，勇敢的黎巴嫩南部人民正在回家——汽车鸣笛，真主党旗帜飘扬，赛义德·哈桑·纳斯鲁拉的肖像被高高举起。

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel President Trump: “[Joe] Kent is a LOSER, just like Tucker, Candace, Megyn, and the rest of them are LOSERS — You're born that way, LOW IQ, and there's not a damn thing they're going to be able to do about it!” President Trump: “Who's dumber, Tucker Carlson or Joe Kent? It's very interesting! ! met Joe Kent at Dover Air Force Base, along with numerous others who had lost their loved ones in War. I said hello to all of the families. Kent, horribly, lost his wife. Her casket was being brought to Dover, along with the rest, although he married again, quite quickly, in my opinion. In any event, a number of years later, I noticed the same person was running for Congress in Washington State, and lost. I then noticed a couple of years later, he was running again, and lost. While I didn't know him other than our brief Dover encounter, but feeling sorry for him after the two Election losses, I told my people, "Hire him for the White House. Give him a job, make him feel good, he lost his wife and two Elections." They did so and, while I rarely saw him, I certainly didn't expect disloyalty, but that's what I got. He was really a SLEAZEBAG, and some would say, on top of it all, A LEAKER!! don't know whether or not that was true, but next time, NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! Kent is a LOSER, just like Tucker, Candace, Megyn, and the rest of them are LOSERS — You're born that way, LOW IQ, and there's not a damn thing they're going to be able to do about it! President DONALD J. TRUMP” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 特朗普总统：“[乔]·肯特（Joe Kent）是个失败者，就像塔克（Tucker）、坎迪斯（Candace）、梅根（Megyn）以及他们中的其他人一样，都是失败者——你们天生如此，智商低下，对此你们什么也做不了！” 特朗普总统：“谁更蠢，塔克·卡尔森（Tucker Carlson）还是乔·肯特？这很有趣！我在多佛空军基地见到了乔·肯特，还有许多在战争中失去亲人的人。我向所有家庭问好。肯特很不幸地失去了他的妻子。她的灵柩和其他人的灵柩一起被运往多佛，尽管在我看来，他很快就再婚了。无论如何，几年后，我注意到同一个人正在华盛顿州竞选国会议员，并失败了。我随后注意到几年后，他又参加竞选，又失败了。虽然除了在多佛的短暂相遇外我不认识他，但在他两次竞选失败后我为他感到难过，我告诉我的手下：‘雇佣他进白宫。给他一份工作，让他感觉好点，他失去了妻子和两次选举。’ 他们照做了，虽然我很少见到他，但我当然没料到他会不忠，但这正是我所得到的。他真是一个卑鄙小人，有些人甚至会说，最重要的是，他还是个泄密者！！我不知道这是否属实，但下次，别再指望我是个好人了！肯特是个失败者，就像塔克、坎迪斯、梅根以及他们中的其他人一样，都是失败者——你们天生如此，智商低下，对此你们什么也做不了！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel President Trump: “Who's dumber, Tucker Carlson or Joe Kent? It's very interesting! ! met Joe Kent at Dover Air Force Base, along with numerous others who had lost their loved ones in War. I said hello to all of the families. Kent, horribly, lost his wife. Her casket was being brought to Dover, along with the rest, although he married again, quite quickly, in my opinion. In any event, a number of years later, I noticed the same person was running for Congress in Washington State, and lost. I then noticed a couple of years later, he was running again, and lost. While I didn't know him other than our brief Dover encounter, but feeling sorry for him after the two Election losses, I told my people, "Hire him for the White House. Give him a job, make him feel good, he lost his wife and two Elections." They did so and, while I rarely saw him, I certainly didn't expect disloyalty, but that's what I got. He was really a SLEAZEBAG, and some would say, on top of it all, A LEAKER!! don't know whether or not that was true, but next time, NO MORE MR. NICE GUY! Kent is a LOSER, just like Tucker, Candace, Megyn, and the rest of them are LOSERS — You're born that way, LOW IQ, and there's not a damn thing they're going to be able to do about it! President DONALD J. TRUMP” tweet

text: Open Source Intel Images released by USA Today show meals recently served to sailors aboard the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier. Hopefully the ship makes a port visit soon and gets a proper resupply. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044910134506258808/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 《今日美国》发布的图片显示了最近在亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰上为水手提供的餐食。希望该舰能尽快停靠港口并获得适当的补给。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044910134506258808/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF to residents of southern Lebanon: Despite the ceasefire entering implementation, troops remain deployed due to continued Hezbollah activity. Civilians are urged not to move south of the Litani River until further notice for their safety. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军（IDF）致黎巴嫩南部居民：尽管停火协议已开始实施，但由于真主党的持续活动，部队仍保持部署状态。为安全起见，敦促平民在另行通知前不要前往利塔尼河以南地区。 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit, and Sailors assigned to amphibious transport dock ship USS New Orleans (LPD 18) support blockade operations against Iran, April 16. U.S. forces are ready and postured to enforce the blockade. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044906933967310995/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 来自第31海军陆战远征部队的美国海军陆战队员和被分配到两栖运输船坞舰“新奥尔良”号（LPD 18）上的水手们于4月16日支持针对伊朗的封锁行动。美军已做好准备并处于戒备状态以执行封锁。 https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044906933967310995/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 An Israeli drone strike targeted a vehicle in the town of Haris, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV: Following verification of an incident in the town of Haris, southern Lebanon initially reported as an Israeli strike on a vehicle, it was later confirmed that the explosion was caused by a war remnant. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 一架以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部哈里斯镇的一辆汽车。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV：在核实了黎巴嫩南部哈里斯镇最初被报道为以色列袭击车辆的事件后，后来证实爆炸是由战争遗留物引起的。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 UNIFIL and the Lebanese army were told by the IDF not to reopen the Qasmiyeh bridge to prevent civilians from returning to towns in southern Lebanon, particularly the Litani area. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 以色列国防军告知联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（UNIFIL）和黎巴嫩军队不要重新开放卡斯米耶（Qasmiyeh）大桥，以防止平民返回黎巴嫩南部城镇，特别是利塔尼地区。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: Al-Qasmiyeh: Locals take it into their own hands to open the road after the LAF's failure to do so since Israel ordered them not to.
text_zh: 卡斯米耶（Al-Qasmiyeh）：在黎巴嫩武装部队（LAF）未能采取行动后，当地人自行采取行动打开了道路，因为以色列命令他们不要这样做。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli forces had carried out an airstrike targeting the southern Lebanese town of Tyre moments before the ceasefire took effect.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列军队在停火生效前片刻对黎巴嫩南部城市提尔（Tyre）进行了空袭。
